settings.question: What concentration are UNSAID fragrances?
settings.answer: Every UNSAID scent is Extrait de Parfum (20–40% oil concentration) — the highest available. Expect 8–24 hours of longevity, with intimate projection.

settings.question: Are UNSAID fragrances unisex?
settings.answer: Yes. We design around states of mind, not gender. Each scent is meant to feel like an extension of you.

settings.question: How should I store my fragrance?
settings.answer: Keep your bottle upright, in a cool dark place, away from direct sunlight and heat. This preserves the integrity of the oils.

settings.question: How long will my order take to arrive?
settings.answer: Orders within India typically ship in 2–5 business days. You will receive a tracking link once dispatched.

settings.question: Can I return or exchange a fragrance?
settings.answer: Unopened products can be returned within 7 days of delivery. For hygiene reasons, opened or used fragrances cannot be returned. See our refund policy for full details.

settings.question: Do you offer samples?
settings.answer: Sample sets for Album 01 will be available soon. Join our list to be notified at launch.

settings.question: Are your fragrances cruelty-free?
settings.answer: Yes. UNSAID does not test on animals at any stage of formulation or production.
